title: install.ps1: probe -> confirm -> mutate -> rollback (mirror install.sh D8)
action: install.ps1 mutates the plugin state (marketplace add + plugin add/remove, :219-288, gated only by -not DryRun) BEFORE its only confirmation (:327), and its own comment (:334-336) admits no rollback exists. Restage to install.sh's proven D8 order (install.sh :270-292 read-only probe, :430 confirm, :433 transition, :339-374 rollback): (1) pre-confirmation phase becomes READ-ONLY (probe current plugin state, compute the plan, print it); (2) single confirmation gate covers BOTH the plugin transition and onboarding apply; (3) plugin mutation moves after confirm, recording prior state first; (4) any later failure triggers rollback restoring the recorded prior plugin state (add back what was removed / remove what was added), mirroring install.sh handle_transition_failure; -DryRun stays fully read-only. Conformance test (no Windows runner): new scripts/test_install_ps1_flow.mjs statically parses install.ps1 and asserts structural order — the confirmation prompt line appears BEFORE any plugin-mutation invocation in execution order (function definitions excluded), a rollback function exists and is referenced from the failure path, and the no-rollback comment is gone; discovery picks the test up automatically. If pwsh exists on PATH, add an optional live -DryRun smoke leg (skip-visible when absent, canary style). RED first (order assertions fail against current script), then GREEN + full verify.

truths: No plugin mutation before the confirmation gate; rollback restores recorded prior state on later failure; -DryRun read-only.
Static conformance test enforces the ordering + rollback presence and runs in verify; optional pwsh smoke leg skips VISIBLY when pwsh is absent.
prohibitions: Do NOT weaken what install.ps1 installs — only the staging/ordering and rollback change.

trace.outcome: install.ps1 restaged to install.sh's D8 order: read-only pre-confirm probe, single confirm gate, plugin mutation moved after confirm, honest rollback on later failure
trace.verify_output: PASS run_verify: 53 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=38109ms (includes test_install_ps1_flow.mjs PASS 200ms; WSL2-flake suites test_store_lock/test_render_race both green)
